column3: HP和耐力系数(BuffID)
料理描述
Add all kinds of rare wild rice, it taste delicious, take your time to enjoy it.
The kut-ku eggs are hard to crack, but it is very delicious to make the egg fried rice.
The use of fresh tuna meat and the finest fresh rice, exceptionally delicious.
Fresh roe wrapped in handmade rice, bite down and the juices will burst in the mouth, incomparably wonderful taste.
All kinds of birds on the meat string, and then cooked in a fire, one can enjoy a variety of different tastes.
The use of mixed shellfish meat crab miso with grilled food, crispy outside and tender, rich nutrition.
A hunter's favorite, cooked with fresh dragon meat and various spices in a rice stew.
Reduced carbohydrate ratio, suitable for hunters who want to keep fit.
Increased the proportion of protein, suitable for muscle growth and development.
This is together the food that is suitable to watch and eat; each wonton are like pieces of white clouds floating on the sea.
Not only in the cooking oil is added pepper, wonton stuffing is basically made of pepper.
Put a lot of spices in the Sliced Boiled Chicken, makes the lips go numb
Add a large number of superior monster ingredients, after cooking in a small fire for a long time does it simmer into a extremely delicious soup.
After adding eight kinds of ingredients, you need to put it in a freezer and cool it quickly to condense the scent of food into the food without being taken away by the air.
